Name: users
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('users', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "auth"."users"."metadata" <@ $3::jsonb) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."display_name" AS "displayName", "_root.base"."metadata" AS "metadata") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
